subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! That which thou didst write was understood and comprehended. Praise be to God that guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده یزدان آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید مفهوم و معلوم گردید حمد خدا را که دلالت
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @critique of Western values; culture, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics
